name: Raid Auctus
short_description: Grow your perfect raid team while the game runs! Build and train your squad from 20 unique classes, enhance their power through permanent upgrades, and watch them conquer challenging raids in Raid Auctus.
detailed_description:
Experience the thrill of RPG raiding in this addictive idle game! In Raid Auctus, you'll build and manage your own raid team that grows stronger while the game is running. Watch your squad conquer challenges, earn epic rewards, and rise to glory - all at your own pace.

Master the art of idle raiding:

  • Build your dream team from 20 classic MMO classes

  • Level up characters to 200 and unlock their full potential

  • Get stronger with each knowledge transfer and unlock permanent upgrades

  • Enhance your characters at the blacksmith

  • Hone your characters to strengthen them without any limits

  • Conquer 40+ raid encounters while managing unique party dynamics

  • Progress your characters while the game is running

Keep your raid team active! Progress your characters, optimize their builds, and collect legendary rewards. No need to coordinate schedules or wait for other players - in Raid Auctus, the perfect raid experience is always at your fingertips as long as you keep it running!

Ready to become a Raid Master? Start your journey in Raid Auctus today!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian
